summary.notes:
No selectors were found that are safe to remove without further runtime analysis. All selectors missing from static HTML are accounted for as runtime-injected elements (nav toggle, cart remove buttons, service-worker update banner).
If you want, we can add an instrumentation run that records DOM mutations during a sample user flow to find genuinely unused selectors.
recommended_next_steps: Add instrumentation (dev-only) that logs DOM additions for a single user flow and re-run the cross-check
Add test coverage for high-risk selectors listed in global_reference_map.json
Create a small migration plan for renaming selectors that includes dual-selector fallbacks and E2E tests
